  • 2. Promo Ad API

  • 3. Customer Order Management
    • 3.1. Fetch Customer Orders.
      This API retrieves a list of orders for the authenticated customer.
      The response includes orders in PUBLISHED status.
    • 3.2. Fetch Customer Orders.
      This API retrieves a list of orders for a specific customer.
    • 3.3. Fetch Order Items.
      This API retrieves a list of items in a specific order.
  • 4. Cart Management
    • 4.1. List Items In Cart.
    • 4.2. Add Item To Cart.
    • 4.3. Remove Item From Cart.
    • 4.4. Increment Item Quantity.
    • 4.5. Decrement Item Quantity.
    • 4.6. Clear Cart.
    • 4.7. Checkout Cart.
    • 4.8. Guest Checkout Cart.

    • 6.2. Create Promotion

    • 6.4. Show Promotion
    • 6.5. Update Promotion
    • 6.6. Delete Promotion
  • 7. ProductStatsController
    • 7.1. Get Top Selling Products (Public)

      Retrieves a list of the most popular products based on total quantity sold.
      This endpoint is public-facing and omits sensitive business metrics.
    • 7.2. Get Top Selling Products (Public)

      Retrieves a list of the most popular products based on total quantity sold.
      This endpoint is public-facing and omits sensitive business metrics.
    • 7.3. Get Top Selling Products base on revenue

      Retrieves a list of the most popular products based on total revenue.

    • 8.1. getCountries
    • 8.2. getStates
  • 9. ReviewController
    • 9.1. Get All Reviews
    • 9.2. Get Product Reviews

  • 10. ColorController
    • 10.1. getAllColors
  • 11. VariationController
    • 11.1. createVariation
  • 12. StatSnapshotController
    • 12.1. Get Recent Snapshots by Domain
      Retrieves the most recently created snapshots for the current tenant.
      Useful for the "Recent Reports" section of the dashboard.
    • 12.2. Invalidate Snapshot
      Invalidates a range of snapshots and triggers a re-computation.
      Limited to 3 invalidations per day per tenant to prevent abuse.
  • 13. Password-less Authentication.
    • 13.1. Initiate Password-less Authentication.
    • 13.2. Initiate Password-less email Authentication.
    • 13.3. Initiate Password-less Phone number Authentication .
    • 13.4. Verify Merchant Email.
    • 13.5. Verify Merchant Phone.
    • 13.6. Verify Customer Email.
    • 13.7. Verify Customer Phone.

    • 14.2. Get Authenticated Customer Profile

    • 15.3. promoteToPrimary
    • 15.4. disableBankAccount

    • 16.1. Verify Merchant Email
    • 16.2. Initiate Merchant Email Verification
  • 17. DashboardController
    • 17.1. Get Order Overview

      Retrieves the high-level order statistics and breakdowns.
    • 17.2. Get Order Volume Chart

      Retrieves the daily chart data for order volumes.
    • 17.3. Get Revenue Overview

      Retrieves revenue statistics including totals, averages, and payment method breakdowns.
    • 17.4. Get Revenue Chart

      Retrieves the daily chart data for revenue.
    • 17.5. Get Customer Insights

      Retrieves customer statistics including top spenders and location breakdown.
    • 17.6. Get Product Insights

      Retrieves product insights including overall catalog numbers and top selling items.
    • 17.7. Get Monthly Sales Chart

      Retrieves the monthly chart data for sales (volume and revenue) for a specific year.

    • 18.1. Register Customer.
    • 18.2. Register Customer Via Google.
    • 18.3. Login Customer Via Google.

    • 35.7. Get All Payment Statuses
  • 36. Authentication.
    • 36.1. Register Shop Owner

      Registers a new shop owner (merchant) account with store details. This endpoint handles the complete
      merchant registration workflow including email verification token generation and merchant creation event publishing.
    • 36.2. Login User (Shop Owner/Merchant)

      Authenticates a shop owner or merchant user using email and password credentials. Upon successful authentication,
      generates a JWT token for subsequent API calls and returns the authenticated user's details.
    • 36.3. Login Customer

      Authenticates a customer user using email and password credentials. Upon successful authentication, generates a JWT token
      for API access and returns the customer's profile information. Also publishes a customer login event for tracking and analytics.
    • 36.4. refreshToken
    • 36.5. logout
  • 37. QAController
    • 37.1. seedMerchantWithOrders
    • 37.2. seedCustomerWithOrders
  • 38. Whatsapp Authentication
    • 38.1. Initiate OTP
    • 38.2. Verify OTP
  • 39. Delivery Zone Management
    • 39.1. Create Delivery Zone.
    • 39.2. Get All Delivery Zones.
    • 39.3. Update Delivery Zone.
    • 39.4. Delete Delivery Zone.

    • 40.1. Get Merchant Profile.
    • 40.2. Get Merchant Business Profile.
  • 41. RoleController
    • 41.1. findAll
  • 42. VariationOptionController
    • 42.1. getAllVariations
  • 43. EmailPreviewController
    • 43.1. previewWelcomeEmail
    • 43.2. previewMerchantNewOrder
    • 43.3. previewCustomerOrderConfirmation
    • 43.4. previewCustomerPaymentConfirmation
    • 43.5. previewForgotPassword
  • 44. UserController
    • 44.1. getUserProfile
    • 44.2. getUserProfileWithRole
    • 44.3. updateContact
  • 45. Order Management
    • 45.1. Get All Orders

      Retrieves a paginated and filtered list of orders for an authenticated shop owner. Supports sorting by various
      fields, pagination, and multiple filtering criteria including search terms, order status, payment status, amount ranges,
      and date ranges.
    • 45.2. Get Order by Order Number

      Retrieves a single order by its order number. Order number is visible to both customers and merchants,
      providing a human-readable alternative to internal order IDs.
    • 45.3. Get Order Detail for Merchant

      Retrieves complete order details including all associated order line items for a shop owner. Provides
      comprehensive view necessary for order fulfillment, including item quantities, prices, and variants.
    • 45.4. Get Order Line Items

      Retrieves all line items (products) associated with a specific order. Each line item includes
      product details, variant information, quantity ordered, and pricing.
    • 45.5. Update Order Status
    • 45.6. Force Update Order Status (Admin Override)

      Bypasses all standard transition rules and forcibly sets the order to the given status.
      Use with caution — this is intended for administrative corrections only (e.g., stuck orders,
      data recovery, third-party sync discrepancies).
    • 45.7. Get Order Statistics
    • 45.8. Get All Order Statuses
  • 46. SocialAuthController
    • 46.1. registerMerchant
  • 47. Product Variation Management (Authenticated)
    • 47.1. Update Product Variation
    • 47.2. Add Product Variation

    • 50.1. List Tenant Categories.
    • 50.2. Create Tenant Category.
    • 50.3. Delete Tenant Category.
  • 51. LocalGovernmentController
    • 51.1. index
  • 52. Public REST Controller for processing Natural Language Query (NLQ) requests.
    Allows merchants to query dashboard stats using plain English phrases.

    Flow:
    1. Receives natural language &quot;query&quot; (e.g. &quot;how are my sales today?&quot;).
    2. Delegates to {@link NaturalLanguageStatParser} to translate the text into structured dates.
    3. Uses {@link StatsQueryService} to fetch actual business metrics for those dates.
    4. Returns both the interpreted range and the resulting statistics data.
    • 52.1. query
  • 53. App Token Management
    • 53.1. Verify Merchant Reset Password Token
  • 54. Forgot Password Management (Unauthenticated)
    • 54.1. Initiate Forgot Password for Customer
    • 54.2. Initiate Forgot Password for Merchant
    • 54.3. Reset Customer Password.
    • 54.4. Reset Merchant Password.

    • 56.2. Create Product
    • 56.3. Update Product
    • 56.4. Get Product Details
    • 56.5. Get Similar Products
    • 56.6. Delete Product
    • 56.7. Get Product Rating

      Retrieves the average customer rating for a product calculated from all customer reviews.
      Rating provides social proof and helps customers make purchase decisions.
    • 56.8. Get Top Selling Products (Public)

      Retrieves a list of the most popular products based on total quantity sold.
      This endpoint is public-facing and omits sensitive business metrics.

1. Payment Gateway

1.1. Resolve Account Number:

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payment-gateway/verify-account-number

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: In test mode use
{
* "accountNumber": "8131974410",
* "bankCode": "001",
* "gateway": "PAYSTACK"
* }

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

accountNumber

string

true

No comments found.

bankCode

string

true

No comments found.

gateway

enum

true

No comments found.
[Enum: PAYSTACK-("PAYSTACK","Nigeria-based processor (Card, Transfer, USSD)"),FLUTTERWAVE-("FLUTTERWAVE","Global infrastructure for Africa-wide payments"),STRIPE-("STRIPE","International card processing (USD/EUR/GBP)"),OFFLINE-("OFFLINE","Manual bank transfer or Cash on Delivery"),MONNIFY-("MONNIFY","Automated bank transfer provider for Nigeria")]

Request-body:

{
  "accountNumber": "",
  "bankCode": "",
  "gateway": "PAYSTACK"
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {}
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payment-gateway/verify-account-number' --data '{
  "accountNumber": "",
  "bankCode": "",
  "gateway": "PAYSTACK"
}'

2. Promo Ad API

2.1. Create Promo Ad

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promo-ads

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: This API creates a new promotional ad.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

adName

string

false

No comments found.

images

array

true

No comments found.

ctaText

string

false

No comments found.

promoCode

string

false

No comments found.

buttons

array

false

No comments found.

string

true

No comments found.

└─position

string

true

No comments found.

└─color

string

true

No comments found.

└─textColor

string

true

No comments found.

└─text

string

true

No comments found.

└─link

string

true

No comments found.

└─metadata

object

false

No comments found.

status

string

true

No comments found.

{
  "adName": "",
  "images": [
    ""
  ],
  "ctaText": "",
  "promoCode": "",
  "buttons": [
    {
      "type": "",
      "position": "",
      "color": "",
      "textColor": "",
      "text": "",
      "link": "",
      "metadata": {}
    }
  ],
  "status": ""
}

2.4. Fetch Promo Ads.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promo-ads

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This API retrieves a list of promotional ads filtered by status and paginated using a cursor.
The response includes promotional ads in either DRAFT or PUBLISHED status.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

status

string

false

No comments found.

cursor

string

false

No comments found.

limit

int32

true

No comments found.

Request-body:

&10

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─data

array

No comments found.

-

     └─id

string

No comments found.

-

     └─adName

string

No comments found.

-

     └─images

array

No comments found.

-

     └─ctaText

string

No comments found.

-

     └─promoCode

No comments found.

-

     └─buttons

array

No comments found.

-

          └─type

string

No comments found.

-

          └─position

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promo-ads?status=&cursor=&limit=10'

2.5. Fetch Published Promo Ads.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promo-ads/published

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This API retrieves a list of published promotional ads.
The response includes promotional ads in PUBLISHED status.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

limit

int32

true

No comments found.

Request-body:

&3

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

array

2.6. Update Promo Ad Status.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promo-ads/update/{id}/status/{status}

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This API updates the status of a specific promotional ad.
The response includes promotional ads in PUBLISHED status.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

id

string

true

No comments found.

status

string

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "data": {},
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X PATCH -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promo-ads/update/{id}/status/{status}'

2.7. Delete Promo Ad.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promo-ads/{id}

Type: DELETE

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This API deletes a specific promotional ad.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

id

string

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "data": {},
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X DELETE -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promo-ads/{id}'

3. Customer Order Management

3.1. Fetch Customer Orders.
This API retrieves a list of orders for the authenticated customer.
The response includes orders in PUBLISHED status.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customer-orders

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Fetch Customer Orders.
This API retrieves a list of orders for the authenticated customer.
The response includes orders in PUBLISHED status.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

page

int32

true

No comments found.

limit

int32

true

No comments found.

sortField

string

true

No comments found.

sortDir

string

true

No comments found.

orderNumber

string

false

Search by order number (exact match) - This is a separate field to allow for precise filtering by order number, while the 'search' field can be used for more general text search across multiple fields (like order number and customer name).

search

string

false

General search text for order number or customer name - This field allows for a broader search that can match either the order number or the customer's name, providing more flexibility in filtering orders based on user input.

status

string

false

Filter by order status

paymentStatus

string

false

Filter by payment status

dateFrom

string

false

Filter by date range start

dateTo

string

false

Filter by date range end

minAmount

double

false

Filter by minimum amount

maxAmount

double

false

Filter by maximum amount

customerId

string

false

Filter by customer ID

productId

string

false

Filter by product ID (orders that contain a specific product)

authCustomer

string

false

Authenticated customer ID (internal use)

createdAt

string

false

No comments found.

updatedAt

string

false

No comments found.

accountNonExpired

false

&0&100&CREATED_AT&DESC

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

└─mapKey

object

A map key.

-

     └─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "mapKey": {
      "warning": "Using java.util.Object as a Map value is not recommended. Smart-doc cannot process it properly. Please use a specific type for better documentation generation."
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customer-orders?page=0&limit=100&sortField=CREATED_AT&sortDir=DESC&orderNumber=&search=&status=true&paymentStatus=&dateFrom=&dateTo=&minAmount=0.0&maxAmount=0.0&customerId=&productId=&authCustomer=&createdAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&updatedAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&accountNonExpired=true&accountNonLocked=true&credentialsNonExpired=true&id=&tenantId=&fullName=&firstName=&lastName=&phoneNumber=&email=&emailVerifiedAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&phoneVerifiedAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&lastLoggedInAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&googleAccount=true&password=¬ificationsEnabled=true&address=&version=0&fullAddress=&street=&streetNumber=&postalCode=&city=&isDefault=true&state=&localGovernment=&country=&businessTradingName=&legalBusinessName=&name=&logo=&businessType=&businessRegistrationNumber=&businessCountry=&businessState=&businessCity=&businessStorefrontUrl=&businessAddress=&businessDescription=&industry=&businessTaxIdNumber=&businessExpectedMonthlyIncome=&staffSize=0&businessPrimaryPhoneNumber=&businessSecondaryPhoneNumber=&businessSupportEmailAddress=&businessGeneralEmailAddress=&kybCompleted=true&profileDetailFilled=true&contactDetailFilled=true&kycCompleted=true&documentsVerified=true&termsAccepted=true&movedToLiveModeAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&complianceNotes=""","""&liveModeReady=true¤cy=&timezone=&language=&code=¤tMode=&liveKey=&testKey=&liveWhitelistedDomains=""","""&testWhitelistedDomains=""","""&slug=&primaryColor=&accentColor=&fontFamily=&heroHeadline=&heroCtaText=&heroBackgroundImage=&instagramUrl=&facebookUrl=&twitterUrl=&youtubeUrl=&linkedinUrl=&tiktokUrl=&createdBy=&dateOfBirth=&nationality=&idType=&idNumber=&idDocumentUrl=&profileUrl='

3.2. Fetch Customer Orders.
This API retrieves a list of orders for a specific customer.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customer-orders/{customerId}

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Fetch Customer Orders.
This API retrieves a list of orders for a specific customer.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

customerId

string

true

No comments found.

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

page

int32

true

No comments found.

limit

int32

true

No comments found.

sortFieldParam

string

true

No comments found.

sortDirectionParam

string

true

No comments found.

orderNumber

string

false

Search by order number (exact match) - This is a separate field to allow for precise filtering by order number, while the 'search' field can be used for more general text search across multiple fields (like order number and customer name).

search

string

false

General search text for order number or customer name - This field allows for a broader search that can match either the order number or the customer's name, providing more flexibility in filtering orders based on user input.

status

string

false

Filter by order status

paymentStatus

string

false

Filter by payment status

dateFrom

string

false

Filter by date range start

dateTo

string

false

Filter by date range end

minAmount

double

false

Filter by minimum amount

maxAmount

double

false

Filter by maximum amount

customerId

string

false

Filter by customer ID

productId

string

false

Filter by product ID (orders that contain a specific product)

authCustomer

string

false

Authenticated customer ID (internal use)

Request-body:

&0&100&ORDER_DATE&DESC

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─mapKey

object

A map key.

-

     └─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "mapKey": {
      "warning": "Using java.util.Object as a Map value is not recommended. Smart-doc cannot process it properly. Please use a specific type for better documentation generation."
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customer-orders/{customerId}?page=0&limit=100&sortFieldParam=ORDER_DATE&sortDirectionParam=DESC&orderNumber=&search=&status=&paymentStatus=&dateFrom=&dateTo=&minAmount=0.0&maxAmount=0.0&customerId=&productId=&authCustomer='

3.3. Fetch Order Items.
This API retrieves a list of items in a specific order.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customer-orders/{orderId}/items

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Fetch Order Items.
This API retrieves a list of items in a specific order.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

4. Cart Management

4.1. List Items In Cart.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/carts/items

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This API retrieves a list of items in the cart.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

X-SessionId

string

false

The X-SessionId header is mandatory for managing cart for none guest customers., if your customer is authenticated, then it will be ignored

X-Session-Id

string

false

No comments found.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

array

No comments found.

└─id

string

No comments found.

└─productId

No comments found.

└─variationId

No comments found.

└─variationPriceId

string

No comments found.

└─customerId

string

No comments found.

└─name

string

No comments found.

-

└─image

string

No comments found.

-

└─price

No comments found.

No comments found.

No comments found.

4.2. Add Item To Cart.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/carts/add

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: This API adds an item to the cart.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

X-SessionId

string

false

The X-SessionId header is mandatory for managing cart for none guest customers., if your customer is authenticated, then it will be ignored

X-Session-Id

string

false

No comments found.

Parameter Type Required Description

productId

string

true

variationId

string

false

string

false

No comments found.

variationPriceId

string

false

No comments found.

quantity

int32

true

No comments found. Validation[Min(value=1)]

string

false

No comments found.

 Header Value Type Required Description

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/carts/checkout

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: This API checks out the cart for the authenticated customer.

 Header Value Type Required Description

string

true

X-SessionId

string

false

The X-SessionId header is mandatory for managing cart for none guest customers., if your customer is authenticated, then it will be ignored

X-Session-Id

string

false

No comments found.

Parameter Type Required Description

firstName

string

true

true

4.8. Guest Checkout Cart.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/carts/guest/checkout

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: This API checks out the cart for a guest user.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

X-SessionId

string

false

The X-SessionId header is mandatory for managing cart for none guest customers., if your customer is authenticated, then it will be ignored

string

true

6. Promotion management.

6.1. Apply Promo Code

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promotions/apply/promo-code

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Applies a promo code to calculate discounted price"

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

promoCode

string

false

The promo code to be applied

amount

double

false

The original amount before discount

Request-body:

{
  "promoCode": "",
  "amount": 0.0
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

double

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": 0.0
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promotions/apply/promo-code' --data '{
  "promoCode": "",
  "amount": 0.0
}'

6.2. Create Promotion

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promotions

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Creates a new promotion (shop owner access required)

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

name

string

true

The name of the promotion

code

string

true

The code for the promotion Validation[Size(max=50, min=3, message=Promotion code must be between 3 and 50 characters)]

description

string

false

A description of the promotion

startDate

string

true

The start date of the promotion Validation[Future(message=Start date must be in the future)]

endDate

string

true

The end date of the promotion Validation[Future(message=End date must be in the future)]

discount

double

true

The discount percentage for the promotion Validation[Min(value=0, message=Discount must be at least 0); Max(value=100, message=Discount cannot exceed 100)]

status

string

false

The status of the promotion (e.g., active, expired, upcoming)

Request-body:

{
  "name": "",
  "code": "",
  "description": "",
  "startDate": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
  "endDate": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
  "discount": 0.0,
  "status": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─createdAt

string

No comments found.

-

└─updatedAt

string

No comments found.

-

└─id

string

No comments found.

-

└─name

string

Name of promotion

-

└─code

string

The code that customers will use to redeem the promotion

-

└─description

string

A description of the promotion

-

└─startDate

string

The start date and time of the promotion

-

└─endDate

string

The end date and time of the promotion

-

└─discount

double

The discount amount for the promotion

-

└─status

string

The status of the promotion (e.g., active, expired, upcoming)

-

└─tenantId

string

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "createdAt": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
    "updatedAt": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
    "id": "",
    "name": "",
    "code": "",
    "description": "",
    "startDate": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
    "endDate": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
    "discount": 0.0,
    "status": "",
    "tenantId": ""
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/promotions' --data '{
  "name": "",
  "code": "",
  "description": "",
  "startDate": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
  "endDate": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
  "discount": 0.0,
  "status": ""
}'

7. ProductStatsController

7.1. Get Top Selling Products (Public)

Retrieves a list of the most popular products based on total quantity sold.
This endpoint is public-facing and omits sensitive business metrics.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/product-stats

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Get Top Selling Products (Public)

Retrieves a list of the most popular products based on total quantity sold.
This endpoint is public-facing and omits sensitive business metrics.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

tenantId

string

false

Optional tenant ID (defaults to current context)

startDate

string

false

No comments found.

endDate

string

false

No comments found.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "data": {},
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/product-stats?tenantId=&startDate=&endDate='

7.2. Get Top Selling Products (Public)

Retrieves a list of the most popular products based on total quantity sold.
This endpoint is public-facing and omits sensitive business metrics.

9. ReviewController

9.1. Get All Reviews

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/reviews

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Retrieves all product reviews in the merchant's store with optional filtering. Shop owners use this to monitor
customer feedback, identify problematic reviews, and manage reputation.

true

9.2. Get Product Reviews

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/reviews/product/{productId}

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Retrieves all reviews for a specific product. Reviews are filtered by status (active, hidden, or pending)
to display only appropriate reviews on product detail pages.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

productId

string

true

Unique identifier of the product to retrieve reviews for.

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

status

string

true

Review status filter: "active" (published), "hidden" (removed from display), or "pending" (awaiting moderation). Default is "active" to show only published reviews.

Request-body:

&ACTIVE

Field Type Description Since

array

9.3. Create/Submit Product Review

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/reviews/add

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Submits a new product review from a customer. Reviews include rating, comment, and reviewer name.
System validates one review per customer per product and performs moderation checks.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Parameter Type Required Description

rating

int32

false

No comments found. Validation[Min(value=1, message=rating must be greater than or equal to 1); Max(value=5, message=rating can not be greater than 5)]

comment

string

true

No comments found.

productId

string

true

No comments found.

customerId

string

false

No comments found.

string

false

No comments found.

  "comment": "",
  "productId": "",
  "customerId": "",
  "tenantId": ""
}

9.4. Delete Review

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/reviews/{reviewId}

Type: DELETE

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This endpoint:
- Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
- Requires Authorization header (@RequireAuthorizationHeader)
- Permanently removes review from system (no recovery possible)
- Review is removed from all product displays
- Useful for removing reviews with false claims, spam, or offensive content
- Use hideReview instead if you want to temporarily remove review

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

reviewId

string

true

Unique identifier of the review to delete.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "data": {},
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X DELETE -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/reviews/{reviewId}'

9.5. Hide Review

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/reviews/hide/{reviewId}

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Hides a review from public display temporarily. Hidden reviews no longer appear on product pages
but remain in system for audit purposes. Reviews can be unhidden if needed (soft deletion).

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

reviewId

string

true

Unique identifier of the review to hide.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "data": {},
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X PATCH -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/reviews/hide/{reviewId}'

12. StatSnapshotController

12.1. Get Recent Snapshots by Domain
Retrieves the most recently created snapshots for the current tenant.
Useful for the "Recent Reports" section of the dashboard.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/dashboard/stats/snapshots

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Get Recent Snapshots by Domain
Retrieves the most recently created snapshots for the current tenant.
Useful for the "Recent Reports" section of the dashboard.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

page

int32

true

No comments found.

size

int32

true

No comments found.

domain

string

true

No comments found.

Request-body:

&0&10&REVENUE

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

array

No comments found.

-

└─id

string

No comments found.

-

└─tenantId

string

No comments found.

-

└─domain

enum

No comments found.
[Enum: ORDERS, REVENUE, PRODUCTS, CUSTOMERS]

-

└─snapshotType

enum

No comments found.
[Enum: DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY, YEARLY, CUSTOM]

-

└─periodStart

string

No comments found.

-

└─periodEnd

string

No comments found.

-

└─status

enum

No comments found.
[Enum: PENDING, COMPUTING, FINALIZED, STALE, FAILED]

-

└─data

object

The actual metrics for the domain. Stored as a raw Map to keep the snapshot system domain-agnostic and avoid over-generalization.

-

     └─mapKey

object

A map key.

-

          └─any object

object

any object.

-

└─computedAt

string

No comments found.

-

└─finalizedAt

string

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{"status":true,"message":"","data":[{"id":"","tenantId":"","domain":ORDERS,"snapshotType":DAILY,"periodStart":"yyyy-MM-dd","periodEnd":"yyyy-MM-dd","status":PENDING,"data":{"mapKey":{"warning":"Using java.util.Object as a Map value is not recommended. Smart-doc cannot process it properly. Please use a specific type for better documentation generation."}}"computedAt":"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss","finalizedAt":"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"}]}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/dashboard/stats/snapshots?page=0&size=10&domain=REVENUE'

12.2. Invalidate Snapshot
Invalidates a range of snapshots and triggers a re-computation.
Limited to 3 invalidations per day per tenant to prevent abuse.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/dashboard/stats/snapshots/{id}/invalidate

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Invalidate Snapshot
Invalidates a range of snapshots and triggers a re-computation.
Limited to 3 invalidations per day per tenant to prevent abuse.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

id

string

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

string

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": ""
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/dashboard/stats/snapshots/{id}/invalidate'

}'

14. CustomerController

14.1. Get All Customers

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customers

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Retrieves a paginated list of customers for a shop owner with advanced pagination support using cursor-based
navigation. Supports filtering by search term, registration date range, account status, and account type.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

cursor

string

false

Optional cursor token from previous response for cursor-based pagination. If not provided, starts from beginning of results.

limit

int32

true

Maximum number of customers per page. Validated to maximum of 20 records per security policy.

page

int32

true

Page number for offset-based pagination (zero-based). Default is 0.

sortFieldParam

string

true

Field to sort by (CREATED_AT, NAME, EMAIL, STATUS, etc.). Default is CREATED_AT.

sortDirectionParam

string

true

Sort direction: "ASC" or "DESC". Default is DESC (newest first).

search

string

false

No comments found.

status

string

false

No comments found.

registeredFrom

string

false

No comments found.

registeredTo

string

false

No comments found.

accountType

string

false

No comments found.

country

string

false

No comments found.

Request-body:

&10&0&CREATED_AT&DESC

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─data

array

No comments found.

-

     └─id

string

No comments found.

-

     └─email

string

No comments found.

-

     └─fullName

string

No comments found.

-

     └─phoneNumber

string

No comments found.

-

     └─address

string

No comments found.

-

     └─status

string

No comments found.

-

     └─createdAt

string

No comments found.

-

     └─updatedAt

string

No comments found.

-

└─nextCursor

string

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "data": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "",
        "email": "",
        "fullName": "",
        "phoneNumber": "",
        "address": "",
        "status": "",
        "createdAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:12",
        "updatedAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:12"
      }
    ],
    "nextCursor": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
  },
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customers?cursor=&limit=10&page=0&sortFieldParam=CREATED_AT&sortDirectionParam=DESC&search=&status=®isteredFrom=®isteredTo=&accountType=&country='

14.2. Get Authenticated Customer Profile

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customers/profile

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This endpoint:
- Requires customer authentication (implicit from SecurityContextHolder)
- No path parameters required - uses authenticated user from JWT token
- Returns customer's own profile data only (privacy-protected)
- CustomerMapper transforms entity to DTO with all profile fields
- Useful for profile display pages in customer dashboard

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─id

string

No comments found.

-

└─email

string

No comments found.

-

└─fullName

string

No comments found.

-

└─phoneNumber

string

No comments found.

-

└─address

string

No comments found.

-

└─status

string

No comments found.

-

└─createdAt

string

No comments found.

-

└─updatedAt

string

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "id": "",
    "email": "",
    "fullName": "",
    "phoneNumber": "",
    "address": "",
    "status": "",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:12",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:12"
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customers/profile'

14.3. Get Specific Customer (Shop Owner View)

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customers/{customerId}

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This endpoint:
- Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
- Allows merchants to view customer details for order fulfillment and customer service
- Returns full customer profile including registration date, contact, account status
- CustomerMapper includes all customer information in response

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

customerId

string

true

Unique identifier of the customer to retrieve.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

string

No comments found.

└─email

No comments found.

└─fullName

No comments found.

    "id": "",
    "email": "",
    "fullName": "",
    "phoneNumber": "",
    "address": "",

14.4. Deactivate Customer Account

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customers/{customerId}/deactivate

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Deactivates a customer account, preventing further login and transactions. The account remains in the system
for historical and audit purposes but becomes inactive. Account can be reactivated if needed.

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

customerId

string

true

Unique identifier of the customer account to deactivate.

Field Type Description Since

object

14.5. Activate Customer Account

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customers/{customerId}/activate

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Reactivates a previously deactivated customer account. Once reactivated, customer can log in and place orders again.
Account retains all historical data and order history.

true

true

14.6. Register New Customer

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/customers/signup

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Registers a new customer account in the current store/tenant. Validates email uniqueness, creates customer record,
and returns customer profile with confirmation of successful registration.

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Parameter Type Required Description

email

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Email(message=Email is invalid)]

password

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=2, message=Password can not be less than 2 characters)]

fullName

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=2, message=full name cannot be less than 2 characters)]

phoneNumber

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=10, message=Phone number cannot be less than 10 characters)]

address

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=5, message=address cannot be less than 5 characters)]

  "password": "",
  "fullName": "",
  "phoneNumber": "",
  "address": ""

 Header Value Type Required Description

string

true

Parameter Type Required Description

fullName

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=2, message=full name can not be less than 2 characters)]

phoneNumber

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Pattern(regexp=^\+?[1-9]\d{9,14}$, message=Phone number must include country code (e.g. 2348012345678))]

address

true

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=5, message=address can not be less than 5 characters)]

false

15. MerchantBankAccountController

15.1. addBankDetails

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/merchants/bank-accounts

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

accountNumber

string

true

No comments found.

bankCode

string

true

No comments found.

gateway

enum

true

No comments found.
[Enum: PAYSTACK-("PAYSTACK","Nigeria-based processor (Card, Transfer, USSD)"),FLUTTERWAVE-("FLUTTERWAVE","Global infrastructure for Africa-wide payments"),STRIPE-("STRIPE","International card processing (USD/EUR/GBP)"),OFFLINE-("OFFLINE","Manual bank transfer or Cash on Delivery"),MONNIFY-("MONNIFY","Automated bank transfer provider for Nigeria")]

Request-body:

              "movedToLiveModeAt": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
              "complianceNotes": [
                ""

              ],

              "twitterUrl": "",

              "createdBy": "",
              "user": {
                "$ref": "..."
              }
            },
            "notificationsEnabled": true
          }
        },
        "notificationsEnabled": true
      }
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/merchants/bank-accounts' --data '{
  "accountNumber": "",
  "bankCode": "",
  "gateway": "PAYSTACK"
}'

15.2. getBankAccounts

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/merchants/bank-accounts

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

boolean

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/merchants/bank-accounts'

15.3. promoteToPrimary

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/merchants/bank-accounts/{id}/promote

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

id

string

true

No comments found.

Field Type Description Since

boolean

Curl-example:

curl -X PATCH -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/merchants/bank-accounts/{id}/promote'

15.4. disableBankAccount

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/merchants/bank-accounts/{id}/disable

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

id

string

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

17. DashboardController

17.1. Get Order Overview

Retrieves the high-level order statistics and breakdowns.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/dashboard/orders

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Get Order Overview

Retrieves the high-level order statistics and breakdowns.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

tenantId

string

false

The unique identifier of the tenant (merchant) to filter by. Defaults to empty (uses authenticated context).

startDate

string

false

The start date for filtering statistics (ISO format). Defaults to empty (no start boundary).

endDate

string

false

The end date for filtering statistics (ISO format). Defaults to empty (no end boundary).

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─mapKey

object

A map key.

-

     └─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "mapKey": {
      "warning": "Using java.util.Object as a Map value is not recommended. Smart-doc cannot process it properly. Please use a specific type for better documentation generation."
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/dashboard/orders?tenantId=&startDate=&endDate='

18. Customer Authentication

18.1. Register Customer.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/auth/customer/signup

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: This API registers a new customer.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

email

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Email(message=Email is invalid)]

password

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=2, message=Password can not be less than 2 characters)]

fullName

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=2, message=full name cannot be less than 2 characters)]

phoneNumber

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=10, message=Phone number cannot be less than 10 characters)]

address

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=5, message=address cannot be less than 5 characters)]

Request-body:

{
  "email": "",
  "password": "",
  "fullName": "",
  "phoneNumber": "",
  "address": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─id

string

No comments found.

-

└─email

string

No comments found.

-

└─fullName

string

No comments found.

-

└─phoneNumber

string

No comments found.

-

└─address

string

No comments found.

-

└─status

string

No comments found.

-

└─createdAt

string

No comments found.

-

└─updatedAt

string

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "id": "",
    "email": "",
    "fullName": "",
    "phoneNumber": "",
    "address": "",
    "status": "",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:08",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:08"
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/auth/customer/signup' --data '{
  "email": "",
  "password": "",
  "fullName": "",
  "phoneNumber": "",
  "address": ""
}'

    "createdAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:08",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:08"
  },
  "token": "",
  "refreshToken": "",
  "expiresIn": 0
}

}'

enum

[Enum: SUCCESS-("SUCCESS","Transaction completed and funds captured"),FAILED-("FAILED","Payment rejected by gateway or insufficient funds"),PENDING-("PENDING","Waiting for customer to initiate or complete payment action"),PROCESSING-("PROCESSING","Payment is undergoing verification or gateway processing"),REFUNDED-("REFUNDED","Transaction has been reversed and funds returned"),ABANDONED-("ABANDONED","Customer exited the payment session without completion")]

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/checkout-links/order/{orderId}'

24. CountryController

24.1. getAllCountries

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/countries

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: 

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/countries?name='

25. TenantStoreController

25.1. Fetch Store Config

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/store/{slug}

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Public endpoint to fetch high-performance store configuration by slug.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

slug

string

true

26. SpecificationController

Description:

 Header Value Type Required Description

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Field Type Description Since

data

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

string

true

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

variationPriceDetailId

string

true

No comments found.

Parameter Type Required Description

productId

string

true

No comments found.

string

true

No comments found.

price

double

false

No comments found. Validation[Min(value=1, message=Price can not be less than 1)]

newPrice

double

false

No comments found.

ramSize

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Pattern(regexp=^\d+(GB|MB|KB|TB)$, message=RAM size must be a number followed by 'GB' or 'MB' or 'KB' or TB (e.g., 4GB, 512MB, 12KB, 1TB))]

Storage

string

false

No comments found.

size

string

false

No comments found.

sku

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=2)]

quantityInStock

int32

false

No comments found. Validation[Min(value=1, message=Quantity can not be less than 1)]

discount

double

false

No comments found. Validation[Min(value=0, message=Discount can not be less than 0); Max(value=100, message=Discount can not be greater than 100)]

            "variationAttributes": {
              "mapKey1": "",
              "mapKey2": ""
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "features": [
      ""
    ],
    "createdAt": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X PATCH -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products/variation/priceDetail/{variationPriceDetailId}'

false

 Header Value Type Required Description

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

file

file

true

No comments found.

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─type

string

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

    "url": "",
    "type": ""
  },
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -F 'file=' -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/files/upload/single/image'

[Enum: PAYSTACK-("PAYSTACK","Nigeria-based processor (Card, Transfer, USSD)"),FLUTTERWAVE-("FLUTTERWAVE","Global infrastructure for Africa-wide payments"),STRIPE-("STRIPE","International card processing (USD/EUR/GBP)"),OFFLINE-("OFFLINE","Manual bank transfer or Cash on Delivery"),MONNIFY-("MONNIFY","Automated bank transfer provider for Nigeria")]

      "subaccount": "",
      "chargeModel": "",
      "platformShare": 0.0,
      "feeBearer": ""
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X PATCH -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/change/password/customer?createdAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&updatedAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&accountNonExpired=true&accountNonLocked=true&credentialsNonExpired=true&id=&tenantId=&fullName=&firstName=&lastName=&phoneNumber=&email=&emailVerifiedAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&phoneVerifiedAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&lastLoggedInAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&googleAccount=true&password=&status=true¬ificationsEnabled=true&address=&version=0&fullAddress=&street=&streetNumber=&postalCode=&city=&customerId=&isDefault=true&state=&localGovernment=&country=&businessTradingName=&legalBusinessName=&name=&logo=&businessType=&businessRegistrationNumber=&businessCountry=&businessState=&businessCity=&businessStorefrontUrl=&businessAddress=&businessDescription=&industry=&businessTaxIdNumber=&businessExpectedMonthlyIncome=&staffSize=0&businessPrimaryPhoneNumber=&businessSecondaryPhoneNumber=&businessSupportEmailAddress=&businessGeneralEmailAddress=&kybCompleted=true&profileDetailFilled=true&contactDetailFilled=true&kycCompleted=true&documentsVerified=true&termsAccepted=true&movedToLiveModeAt=yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss&complianceNotes=""","""&liveModeReady=true¤cy=&timezone=&language=&code=¤tMode=&liveKey=&testKey=&liveWhitelistedDomains=""","""&testWhitelistedDomains=""","""&slug=&primaryColor=&accentColor=&fontFamily=&heroHeadline=&heroCtaText=&heroBackgroundImage=&instagramUrl=&facebookUrl=&twitterUrl=&youtubeUrl=&linkedinUrl=&tiktokUrl=&createdBy=&dateOfBirth=&nationality=&idType=&idNumber=&idDocumentUrl=&profileUrl='

33.2. Change Merchant Password

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/change/password/merchant

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/json

Description: This API changes the password of an authenticated merchant.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

false

35. Payment Management

35.1. Get All Payments

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Retrieves a paginated list of payments for a tenant with cursor-based navigation.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

cursor

string

false

Optional cursor token for pagination.

limit

int32

true

Maximum number of records per page.

sortDirectionParam

string

true

Sort direction: "ASC" or "DESC". Default is DESC.

status

string

false

No comments found.

gateway

string

false

No comments found.

paymentMethod

string

false

No comments found.

reference

string

false

No comments found.

customerId

string

false

No comments found.

Request-body:

&10&DESC

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─mapKey

object

A map key.

-

     └─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "mapKey": {
      "warning": "Using java.util.Object as a Map value is not recommended. Smart-doc cannot process it properly. Please use a specific type for better documentation generation."
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments?cursor=&limit=10&sortDirectionParam=DESC&status=&gateway=&paymentMethod=&reference=&customerId='

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

orderId

string

true

35.3. Initialize Customer Payment

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/initialize

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Initializes a payment transaction for an authenticated customer's order. Validates the requested payment gateway
and method, ensures the merchant has configured the payment gateway, creates a payment record, and initiates
the payment processing with the external payment gateway.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

orderId

string

true

The order id of the order to be paid for

paymentMethod

string

true

The payment method to be used for the payment

paymentGateway

string

true

The payment gateway to be used for the payment The following payment gateways are supported: - PAYSTACK - FLUTTERWAVE (coming soon) - STRIPE (coming soon) - OFFLINE

currency

string

true

The currency to be used for the payment

callbackUrl

string

false

The callback URL to be used for the payment that are not offline

Request-body:

{
  "orderId": "",
  "paymentMethod": "",
  "paymentGateway": "",
  "currency": "",
  "callbackUrl": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "data": {},
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/initialize' --data '{
  "orderId": "",
  "paymentMethod": "",
  "paymentGateway": "",
  "currency": "",
  "callbackUrl": ""
}'

35.4. Initialize Guest Payment

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/guest/initialize

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Initializes a payment transaction for a guest (unauthenticated) customer's order.
Performs same validation as customer payment initialization but without requiring user authentication.
Guest payment includes currency validation and creates a guest-friendly payment record.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

orderId

string

true

The order id of the order to be paid for

paymentMethod

string

true

The payment method to be used for the payment

paymentGateway

string

true

The payment gateway to be used for the payment The following payment gateways are supported: - PAYSTACK - FLUTTERWAVE (coming soon) - STRIPE (coming soon) - OFFLINE

currency

string

true

The currency to be used for the payment

callbackUrl

string

false

The callback URL to be used for the payment that are not offline

Request-body:

{
  "orderId": "",
  "paymentMethod": "",
  "paymentGateway": "",
  "currency": "",
  "callbackUrl": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "data": {},
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/guest/initialize' --data '{
  "orderId": "",
  "paymentMethod": "",
  "paymentGateway": "",
  "currency": "",
  "callbackUrl": ""
}'

35.5. Verify and Confirm Payment

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/confirm

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Verifies payment completion with the external payment gateway using the payment reference. Confirms the payment
amount, currency, and status, updates the payment record with gateway verification details, and triggers order status
progression to PROCESSING. Also sends notification emails to merchant.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

X-Session-Id

string

false

Optional session identifier for tracking payment
confirmation events and audit logs.

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

reference

string

true

No comments found.

Request-body:

{
  "reference": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -H "X-Session-Id" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/confirm' --data '{
  "reference": ""
}'

35.6. Update Payment Status

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/{paymentId}/status

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Updates the payment status for a specific payment record. Used by shop owners
to manually confirm or adjust
payment status, particularly for offline or manual payment methods. Records
status transition history and
updates associated order status accordingly.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

paymentId

string

true

Unique identifier of the payment record to update. Must belong to current tenant.

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

status

string

true

No comments found.

proofOfPayment

string

false

No comments found.

notes

string

false

No comments found.

Request-body:

{
  "status": "",
  "proofOfPayment": "",
  "notes": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {}
}

Curl-example:

curl -X PATCH -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/{paymentId}/status'

35.7. Get All Payment Statuses

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/statuses

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Returns an array of all possible payment statuses defined in the system.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

array

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": [
    "SUCCESS"
  ]
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/payments/statuses'

36. Authentication.

36.1. Register Shop Owner

Registers a new shop owner (merchant) account with store details. This endpoint handles the complete
merchant registration workflow including email verification token generation and merchant creation event publishing.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/auth/signup/merchant

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: This endpoint:
- Validates email uniqueness before registration
- Automatically assigns the STORE_OWNER role
- Creates a new tenant (store) associated with the user
- Generates an email verification token (random digit format)
- Constructs a verification URL with token and email
- Sends a welcome email with verification details
- Publishes a MerchantCreatedEvent for event-driven processing
- Skips tenant context validation as registration is tenant-independent
- Email verification is mandatory before full account activation

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

email

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Email(message=Email is invalid)]

password

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=2, message=Password can not be less than 2 characters)]

fullName

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=2, message=full name cannot be less than 2 characters)]

phoneNumber

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=10, message=Phone number cannot be less than 10 characters)]

address

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=5, message=address cannot be less than 5 characters)]

storeName

string

true

No comments found.

clientUrl

string

false

No comments found.

Request-body:

{
  "email": "",
  "password": "",
  "fullName": "",
  "phoneNumber": "",
  "address": "",
  "storeName": "",
  "clientUrl": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─id

string

No comments found.

-

└─email

string

No comments found.

-

└─fullName

string

No comments found.

-

└─phoneNumber

string

No comments found.

-

└─address

string

No comments found.

-

└─createdAt

string

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "id": "",
    "email": "",
    "fullName": "",
    "phoneNumber": "",
    "address": "",
    "createdAt": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/auth/signup/merchant' --data '{
  "email": "",
  "password": "",
  "fullName": "",
  "phoneNumber": "",
  "address": "",
  "storeName": "",
  "clientUrl": ""
}'

36.2. Login User (Shop Owner/Merchant)

Authenticates a shop owner or merchant user using email and password credentials. Upon successful authentication,
generates a JWT token for subsequent API calls and returns the authenticated user's details.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/auth/login

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: This endpoint:
- Uses email and password for credential validation
- Generates a JWT token with user identity and roles embedded
- Token is valid for the configured expiration duration (typically 24 hours or per configuration)
- X-Session-Id header is optional and used for tracking login events
- Skips tenant context validation as login is tenant-independent
- Returned token must be included in Authorization header for subsequent API calls
- Password hashing verification is performed server-side for security

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

X-Session-Id

string

false

Optional session identifier header (X-Session-Id) for tracking login events and session management.
If not provided, login proceeds without explicit session tracking.

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

email

string

false

No comments found.

password

string

false

No comments found.

Request-body:

{
  "email": "",
  "password": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

user

object

No comments found.

-

└─id

string

No comments found.

-

└─email

string

No comments found.

-

└─fullName

string

No comments found.

-

└─phoneNumber

string

No comments found.

-

└─address

string

No comments found.

-

└─createdAt

string

No comments found.

-

token

string

No comments found.

-

refreshToken

string

No comments found.

-

expiresIn

int64

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "user": {
    "id": "",
    "email": "",
    "fullName": "",
    "phoneNumber": "",
    "address": "",
    "createdAt": "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
  },
  "token": "",
  "refreshToken": "",
  "expiresIn": 0
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -H "X-Session-Id" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/auth/login' --data '{
  "email": "",
  "password": ""
}'

36.3. Login Customer

Authenticates a customer user using email and password credentials. Upon successful authentication, generates a JWT token
for API access and returns the customer's profile information. Also publishes a customer login event for tracking and analytics.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/auth/login/customer

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: This endpoint:
- Authenticates customer in the context of current tenant/store
- Generates JWT token specific to customer identity and permissions
- Returns complete customer profile including preferences, account type, and status
- X-Session-Id header enables customer login event publishing for tracking and audit logs
- Token expiration is returned in milliseconds for client-side token refresh logic
- Publishes CustomerLoginEvent only if sessionId is provided and tenant is valid
- Customer must belong to the current tenant context for successful authentication
- Requires active tenant context (unlike shop owner login which skips tenant check)

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

X-Session-Id

string

false

Optional session identifier header (X-Session-Id) for tracking customer login events and session correlation.
If provided along with valid tenant, publishes CustomerLoginEvent for event-driven processing.

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

email

string

false

No comments found.

password

string

false

No comments found.

Request-body:

{
  "email": "",
  "password": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

customer

object

No comments found.

-

└─id

string

No comments found.

-

└─email

string

No comments found.

-

└─fullName

string

No comments found.

-

└─phoneNumber

string

No comments found.

-

└─address

string

No comments found.

-

└─status

string

No comments found.

-

└─createdAt

string

No comments found.

-

└─updatedAt

string

No comments found.

-

token

string

No comments found.

-

refreshToken

string

No comments found.

-

expiresIn

int64

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "customer": {
    "id": "",
    "email": "",
    "fullName": "",
    "phoneNumber": "",
    "address": "",
    "status": "",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:08",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-31 16:19:08"
  },
  "token": "",
  "refreshToken": "",
  "expiresIn": 0
}

Curl-example:

curl -X POST -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -H "X-Session-Id" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/auth/login/customer' --data '{
  "email": "",
  "password": ""
}'

42. VariationOptionController

42.1. getAllVariations
