45. Order Management

45.1. Get All Orders

Retrieves a paginated and filtered list of orders for an authenticated shop owner. Supports sorting by various
fields, pagination, and multiple filtering criteria including search terms, order status, payment status, amount ranges,
and date ranges.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This endpoint:
- Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
- Retrieves orders for current authenticated tenant/merchant
- Converts strongly-typed OrderQueryRequest to Map for service layer compatibility
- Supports dynamic filtering: search (order number, customer), status, paymentStatus, amount range, date range
- Default sorting by ORDER_DATE in descending order (newest first)
- Response includes pagination metadata for client-side navigation
- OrderMapper converts entity objects to DTOs with necessary fields only
- Useful for order management dashboards and reporting

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

page

int32

true

Zero-based page number for pagination. Default is 0 (first page).

limit

int32

true

Maximum number of records per page. Default is 100, adjustable for performance.

sortField

string

true

Field name to sort results by (ORDER_DATE, CREATED_AT, ORDER_AMOUNT, etc.). Default is ORDER_DATE.

sortDir

string

true

Sort direction: "ASC" for ascending or "DESC" for descending. Default is DESC.

withCursor

boolean

true

No comments found.

cursor

string

false

No comments found.

orderNumber

string

false

Search by order number (exact match) - This is a separate field to allow for precise filtering by order number, while the 'search' field can be used for more general text search across multiple fields (like order number and customer name).

search

string

false

General search text for order number or customer name - This field allows for a broader search that can match either the order number or the customer's name, providing more flexibility in filtering orders based on user input.

status

string

false

Filter by order status

paymentStatus

string

false

Filter by payment status

dateFrom

string

false

Filter by date range start

dateTo

string

false

Filter by date range end

minAmount

double

false

Filter by minimum amount

maxAmount

double

false

Filter by maximum amount

customerId

string

false

Filter by customer ID

productId

string

false

Filter by product ID (orders that contain a specific product)

authCustomer

string

false

Authenticated customer ID (internal use)

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {}
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders?page=0&limit=100&sortField=ORDER_DATE&sortDir=DESC&withCursor=false&cursor=&orderNumber=&search=&status=&paymentStatus=&dateFrom=&dateTo=&minAmount=0.0&maxAmount=0.0&customerId=&productId=&authCustomer='

45.2. Get Order by Order Number

Retrieves a single order by its order number. Order number is visible to both customers and merchants,
providing a human-readable alternative to internal order IDs.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/{orderNumber}/show

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This endpoint:
- Accessible without shop owner restriction (visible to customers and admins)
- Retrieves order for current tenant context
- Returns complete order information including contact details
- Useful for order tracking pages where customer provides order number
- OrderMapper includes all relevant order details in response

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

orderNumber

string

true

The unique order number (e.g., "ORD-20260308-001") assigned at order creation. Visible in customer receipts and emails.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─mapKey

object

A map key.

-

     └─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "mapKey": {
      "warning": "Using java.util.Object as a Map value is not recommended. Smart-doc cannot process it properly. Please use a specific type for better documentation generation."
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/{orderNumber}/show'

45.3. Get Order Detail for Merchant

Retrieves complete order details including all associated order line items for a shop owner. Provides
comprehensive view necessary for order fulfillment, including item quantities, prices, and variants.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/detail

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This endpoint:
- Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
- Retrieves complete order including all line items
- OrderLineMapper includes product details, quantities, unit prices, and discounts
- Essential for order fulfillment workflow
- Returns detailed information not included in list view

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

orderId

string

true

Unique identifier of the order. Must belong to the authenticated merchant's tenant.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─mapKey

object

A map key.

-

     └─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "mapKey": {
      "warning": "Using java.util.Object as a Map value is not recommended. Smart-doc cannot process it properly. Please use a specific type for better documentation generation."
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/detail'

45.4. Get Order Line Items

Retrieves all line items (products) associated with a specific order. Each line item includes
product details, variant information, quantity ordered, and pricing.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/items

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This endpoint:
- Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
- Returns only items/line items, not order summary
- OrderLineMapper includes detailed product information and variant selections
- Useful for constructing packing slips or generating invoices
- Separating items retrieval allows efficient data loading patterns

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

orderId

string

true

Unique identifier of the order. Must belong to the authenticated merchant's tenant.

45.5. Update Order Status

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/status

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Updates the current status of an order to reflect fulfillment progress. Valid status transitions are enforced
to prevent invalid workflow progressions. Records an audit trail entry capturing who changed the status and why.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

orderId

string

true

Unique identifier of the order to update. Must belong to authenticated merchant's tenant.

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

status

string

true

No comments found.

reason

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Size(max=500, min=3, message=Reason should be minimum of 3 characters and maximum of 500 characters)]

Request-body:

{
  "status": "",
  "reason": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

array

No comments found.

-

└─id

string

No comments found.

-

└─orderId

string

No comments found.

-

└─quantity

int32

No comments found.

-

└─price

double

No comments found.

-

└─totalPrice

double

45.6. Force Update Order Status (Admin Override)

Bypasses all standard transition rules and forcibly sets the order to the given status.
Use with caution — this is intended for administrative corrections only (e.g., stuck orders,
data recovery, third-party sync discrepancies).

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/force-status

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Force Update Order Status (Admin Override)

Bypasses all standard transition rules and forcibly sets the order to the given status.
Use with caution — this is intended for administrative corrections only (e.g., stuck orders,
data recovery, third-party sync discrepancies).

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

orderId

string

true

Unique identifier of the order to update.

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

status

string

true

No comments found.

reason

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Size(max=500, min=3, message=Reason should be minimum of 3 characters and maximum of 500 characters)]

Request-body:

{
  "status": "",
  "reason": ""
}

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {}
}

Curl-example:

curl -X PATCH -k -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/{orderId}/force-status'

45.7. Get Order Statistics

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/merchant/stats

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Retrieves comprehensive order statistics for a merchant including order count, total revenue, average order value,
orders by status breakdown, and other aggregated metrics useful for business insights and dashboards.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

data

object

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
  "data": {},
  "message": "",
  "status": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/merchant/stats'

45.8. Get All Order Statuses

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/statuses

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Returns an array of all possible order statuses defined in the system.
This endpoint is public and does not require tenant context.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

array

No comments found.

-

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": [
    "PENDING"
  ]
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/orders/statuses'

false

52. Public REST Controller for processing Natural Language Query (NLQ) requests.
Allows merchants to query dashboard stats using plain English phrases.

Flow:
1. Receives natural language &quot;query&quot; (e.g. &quot;how are my sales today?&quot;).
2. Delegates to {@link NaturalLanguageStatParser} to translate the text into structured dates.
3. Uses {@link StatsQueryService} to fetch actual business metrics for those dates.
4. Returns both the interpreted range and the resulting statistics data.

52.1. query

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/stats/natural-query

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

query

string

false

No comments found.

Request-body:

{
  "query": ""
}

Field Type Description Since

interpretedAs

string

No comments found.

from

string

No comments found.

to

string

No comments found.

-

domains

array

No comments found.

-

object

No comments found.

object

any object.

array

Most popular shipping methods within the timeframe

object

A map key.

object

any object.

└─revenueMetrics

object

No comments found.

-

     └─grossRevenue

number

Total revenue before any deductions (Discounts/Refunds)

-

number

Final revenue after all deductions have been subtracted

-

number

Total amount refunded to customers in this period

number

Total monetary value of coupons and discounts applied

object

number

A map key.

string

ISO currency code, e.g., "NGN"

object

No comments found.

int64

Total unique products registered in the system

-

int64

Count of products created within the filter period

-

int64

Count of products currently having a stock level > 0

-

int64

Count of products currently out of stock

-

number

array

Enriched list of top-performing products

string

No comments found.

string

No comments found.

int64

No comments found.

int64

object

A map key.

56. Product Management

56.1. Get All Products

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Retrieves a paginated list of products with optional filtering and sorting. Supports filtering by search term,
category, brand, color, price range, stock status, and customer rating. Results are returned in pages for efficient
data loading and display.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

page

int32

true

Zero-based page number for pagination. Default is 0 (first page). Must be >= 0.

limit

int32

true

Maximum number of products per page. Default is 100, adjustable for performance.

sortFieldParam

string

true

Field to sort by (CREATED_AT, NAME, PRICE, RATING, etc.). Default is CREATED_AT.

sortDirectionParam

string

true

Sort direction: "ASC" for ascending or "DESC" for descending. Default is DESC.

search

string

false

No comments found.

category

string

false

No comments found.

brand

string

false

No comments found.

color

string

false

No comments found.

minPrice

double

false

No comments found.

maxPrice

double

false

No comments found.

availability

boolean

false

No comments found.

status

string

false

No comments found.

minRating

double

false

No comments found.

Request-body:

&0&100&CREATED_AT&DESC

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─mapKey

object

A map key.

-

     └─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "mapKey": {
      "warning": "Using java.util.Object as a Map value is not recommended. Smart-doc cannot process it properly. Please use a specific type for better documentation generation."
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products?page=0&limit=100&sortFieldParam=CREATED_AT&sortDirectionParam=DESC&search=&category=&brand=&color=&minPrice=0.0&maxPrice=0.0&availability=true&status=&minRating=0.0'

56.2. Create Product

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products

Type: POST

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Creates a new product in the merchant's store (tenant). Validates product details including brand, color,
and category associations. Specifications are validated against tenant-specific configuration. Product is
immediately published upon creation unless status is set to INACTIVE.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

id

string

false

No comments found.

name

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=1)]

slug

string

false

No comments found.

description

string

true

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=1000, min=5, message=Description must be between 5-1000 characters)]

summary

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=500, min=5, message=Summary must be between 5-500 characters)]

image

string

true

No comments found.

thumbnail

string

true

No comments found.

imageList

array

false

No comments found.

features

56.3. Update Product

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products/{productId}

Type: PATCH

Content-Type: application/json

Description: Updates an existing product's details. Allows modification of product information including name, description,
pricing, status, and specifications. Only merchant who owns the product can update it.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

productId

string

true

Unique identifier of the product to update. Must belong to authenticated merchant's tenant.

Body-parameters:

Parameter Type Required Description

name

string

false

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=1, message=Product name must have at least 1 character)]

false

56.4. Get Product Details

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products/{productId}

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Retrieves complete details of a single product including all attributes, specifications, pricing,
availability, and related information.

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

productId

string

true

Unique identifier of the product. Must belong to current tenant context.

56.5. Get Similar Products

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products/similar/by/category/{productId}

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Retrieves a list of products similar to a specified product, typically from the same category or with
related attributes. Useful for "You might also like" or "Related products" sections in product detail pages.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

productId

string

true

Unique identifier of the reference product. Must belong to current tenant.

Query-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

limit

int32

true

Maximum number of similar products to return. Default is 4, adjustable based on UI requirements.

Request-body:

&4

Field Type Description Since

boolean

No comments found. Validation[Pattern(regexp=^\d+(GB|MB|KB|TB)$, message=RAM size must be a number followed by 'GB' or 'MB' or 'KB' or TB (e.g., 4GB, 512MB, 12KB, 1TB))]

-

          └─Storage

string

No comments found.

-

          └─size

string

No comments found.

-

          └─sku

string

No comments found. Validation[Length(max=2147483647, min=2)]

-

          └─quantityInStock

int32

No comments found. Validation[Min(value=1, message=Quantity can not be less than 1)]

-

          └─discount

double

No comments found. Validation[Min(value=0, message=Discount can not be less than 0); Max(value=100, message=Discount can not be greater than 100)]

-

object

No comments found.

-

string

A map key.

-

└─features

array

No comments found.

-

No comments found.

56.6. Delete Product

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products/{productId}

Type: DELETE

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Permanently deletes a product from the merchant's store. Product details are removed from system but
historical order records remain intact for audit purposes.

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

productId

string

true

Unique identifier of the product to delete. Must belong to authenticated merchant's tenant.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

any object.

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {}
}

Curl-example:

curl -X DELETE -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products/{productId}'

56.7. Get Product Rating

Retrieves the average customer rating for a product calculated from all customer reviews.
Rating provides social proof and helps customers make purchase decisions.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products/{productId}/rating

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: This endpoint:
- Public endpoint (no authentication required)
- Computes average rating from all published customer reviews
- Rating range is typically 1.0 to 5.0 stars
- Returns 0.0 if product has no reviews yet
- Used in product listings and detail pages to display customer sentiment
- Computation is cached or aggregated query for performance

Request-headers:

 Header Value Type Required Description

X-MerchantApiKey

string

true

For every request the X-MerchantApiKey header is mandatory. You will get an error if the X-MerchantApiKey is not supplied when it is required

Path-parameters:

 Parameter Value Type Required Description

productId

string

true

Unique identifier of the product. Must belong to current tenant.

Response-fields:

Field Type Description Since

status

boolean

No comments found.

-

message

string

No comments found.

-

data

object

No comments found.

-

└─mapKey

object

A map key.

-

     └─any object

object

any object.

-

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "",
  "data": {
    "mapKey": {
      "warning": "Using java.util.Object as a Map value is not recommended. Smart-doc cannot process it properly. Please use a specific type for better documentation generation."
    }
  }
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -k -H "X-MerchantApiKey:pk_test" -i 'https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products/{productId}/rating'

56.8. Get Top Selling Products (Public)

Retrieves a list of the most popular products based on total quantity sold.
This endpoint is public-facing and omits sensitive business metrics.

URL: https://api.shopsynch.com/v1/products/top-selling

Type: GET

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Description: Get Top Selling Products (Public)

Retrieves a list of the most popular products based on total quantity sold.
This endpoint is public-facing and omits sensitive business metrics.

 Header Value Type Required Description

string

true

endDate

59. Data Dictionaries

59.1. Order Status Codes

Code Type Description

PENDING

string

Order has been placed but not paid

PROCESSING

string

Payment confirmed, preparing items

SHIPPED

string

Handed over to courier

DELIVERED

string

Received by customer

CANCELLED

string

Order revoked by user or system

IN_TRANSIT

string

Currently on the road

FAILED

string

Payment or logistics failure

ABANDONED

string

Order abandoned by customer

59.2. Payment Statuses

Code Type Description

SUCCESS

string

Transaction completed and funds captured

FAILED

string

Payment rejected by gateway or insufficient funds

PENDING

string

Waiting for customer to initiate or complete payment action

PROCESSING

string

Payment is undergoing verification or gateway processing

REFUNDED

string

Transaction has been reversed and funds returned

ABANDONED

string

Customer exited the payment session without completion

59.3. Payment Gateways

Code Type Description

PAYSTACK

string

Nigeria-based processor (Card, Transfer, USSD)

FLUTTERWAVE

string

Global infrastructure for Africa-wide payments

STRIPE

string

International card processing (USD/EUR/GBP)

OFFLINE

string

Manual bank transfer or Cash on Delivery

MONNIFY

string

Automated bank transfer provider for Nigeria
